content:
#### YOUR PRIORITIES FOR TODAY

| | |
| ------------------ | ----------------------------------------------------------- |
| Overdue follow-ups | **4 leads not contacted in 7+ days** |
| Stale quotes | **6 quotes open with no activity in 30+ days** |
| Scheduled today | **2 callbacks, 1 demo booked** |
| Highest priority | **Johnson Landscaping - 3TS inquiry, no response sent yet** |

***Recommended start:** Contact Johnson Landscaping first - active inquiry with no response. Then work through stale quotes before they go cold.*
